note: Unofficial demo assets. The primary wordmark was supplied with the task; white and spark-mark variants were derived locally. optus.com.au CDN was unreachable from the build VM (egress blocked), so photography is replaced by Optus-yellow colour blocks. Not affiliated with Singtel Optus Pty Limited.

assets.source: Provided optus wordmark (recoloured to ink #142433 for light headers)
Provided optus wordmark (recoloured to white for dark surfaces)
Derived Optus-yellow spark mark for small/icon use
Derived spark mark on ink rounded square for the browser tab

intendedOfficialSources.note: Use these when egress to optus.com.au is enabled.
